What changed and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Calendar / Ganzhi helper
- [ ] Bazi / Ziwei chart utility

## Testing

```bash
python -m unittest discover -s tests
```

Add any additional commands or manual validation here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I updated docs for public API or CLI changes.
- [ ] I did not commit API keys, `.env`, private model responses, or generated logs.
- [ ] I documented data provenance for any data changes.
